message:
feat(fp-frame): add Series.divmod/rdivmod parity (frankenpandas-nk83)

Adds Series::divmod returning (self // other, self % other) tuple and
Series::rdivmod with swapped operands, matching pd.Series.divmod /
pd.Series.rdivmod. Built atop existing floordiv/modulo, so alignment
and null-propagation semantics are inherited unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
